The '''Siege of [[Wann Tsir]]''' was a battle of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==The battle==
The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] laid siege to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Wann Tsir]], using at least one [[Siege platform/Legends|Dedicated Siege Platform]] commanded by [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Titus Klev]]. During the engagement, Klev accidentally discovered an [[New Republic/Legends|Alliance]] [[Agent/Legends|agent]] attempting to sabotage the platforms [[Deflector shield/Legends|deflector shields]],<ref name="DESB" /> earning him commendations from [[Imperial High Command/Legends|Imperial High Command]].<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|III|319|Wann Tsir}}</ref>
